summary: One of the six abodes, uniquely located beside the sea.
shortHistory: Seashore temple where Murugan is worshipped after victory over Surapadman.
overview: Seashore temple where Murugan is worshipped after victory over Surapadman.
architecture: Temple architecture combines sacred orientation, mandapa layout, gopuram symbolism, and devotional circulation. This record is provided as a structured starting point and should be expanded with verified source review.
pilgrimGuide: Prefer early morning darshan on festival days
Respect temple dress and photography rules

howToReach.rail: Check nearest major railway station before travel
howToReach.road: Accessible by local road routes and buses depending on temple location
howToReach.air: Use nearest regional airport where applicable
